FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class SlabAllocator<T>

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

Stable, generation-versioned slab over T. Index 0 is reserved as the null slot, so default(Handle) is null. Generation is bumped on Free (ABA defense). O(1) alloc/free via an intrusive int free-list. Pointer-bearing T uses a side _next array (we always do, here).

public sealed class SlabAllocator<T> where T : unmanaged

T

object

h Handle

Get(Handle)

Mutable view of the slot. Must NOT be held across an Alloc() that can grow.

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
